Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}I think I'm slowly starting to get over my fear of men.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}So far, I can only talk to boys I know, but... I can almost look them in the eye![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}But with you, {f 4 1}-san, I... I think I can do even better![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}As long as it's nothing too scary... G-Go ahead![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If I make the wrong move[n]here, I might upset her.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 4 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}I-I'm so sorry! I can't believe I said something so inappropriate![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I held Chihiro's hand until it was time[n]to part, then went back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}W-We aren't even officially dating... Why would you do this!?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 4 23 0 109 2 25 25}D-Do you think it's funny? Just what kind of girl do you think I am!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}I can't believe you would do something like that, {f 4 1}-san... I was wrong about you![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}And e-even if I did feel the same way about you... that still doesn't make it okay...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Having been left alone, I decided[n]to go back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I walked with Chihiro until it was[n]time to head in a different direction.[n]{f 1 1}
